Specification is auto-generated by setup_task.sh at runtime. Phone number uses reserved 555 prefix (555-BANK). Bank name Coastal Bank is fictional. Project CSVP v2.0 appears to be created specifically for this task.
install_drawio.sh line 52 specifies DRAWIO_VERSION=26.0.9. Verified as valid release via GitHub API (released January 27, 2025) with x86_64 AppImage available.

privileged_info_summary: The IVR Call Flow Design task is a structured exercise using synthetic banking data generated at runtime. All metadata claims have been verified: the specification file is auto-generated by setup_task.sh at /home/ga/Desktop/ivr_spec.txt containing all required keywords (business hours, closed, account number, valid, retry, fraud, balance, mortgage). The specification describes a fictional bank Coastal Bank with defined requirements: Mon-Fri business hours 09:00-17:00 EST, 10-digit account number validation with maximum 3 retry attempts, and a main menu structure including balance inquiry, fraud reporting, and loan/mortgage options. The task requires creating a flowchart diagram with minimum 15 shapes and 15 edges. Draw.io version 26.0.9 is confirmed as a valid release. All file paths and output locations are correctly specified in the metadata.
